raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, a charge of {$11000.00} appeared on my American Express account for a purchase from The XXXX XXXX. I did not authorize this charge as described, and I raised a dispute with American Express immediately. 
American Express initially closed the dispute without providing any explanation or access to the merchants evidence. I requested the full decision letter and all supporting documentation submitted by the merchant, but they did not provide it. Written statements alone were deemed insufficient, and there is no option to escalate or request a supervisor review. 
The dispute reason selected is Goods received not as described, but I was not given the opportunity to provide documentation or evidence of misrepresentation or deceptive practices. I am concerned that the dispute process is not allowing me a fair review and that I may be forced to pay a charge I did not authorize. 
I am seeking CFPB assistance to ensure that American Express provides the merchants evidence, fully reviews my dispute, and allows me to resolve this matter without being held responsible for the charge while the investigation is pending.
